ValidationRule.description: The Invoice is ready, change only by Finance
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c,"Ready"), PRIORVALUE(InvoiceStatus__c)="Ready", NOT(ISCHANGED( RelevantToRevenue__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED( CancellationDate__c )), DATEVALUE(LastModifiedDate) <= today(), $User.IsFinanceManager__c = false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Invoice is in status "Ready" and can only be changed by Finance. (IN021)
